sequence: Open Social Consumer and Creator Entry
preFixReproduction.observed: The embedded legacy Work state opened on Screen 04 and the master walkthrough displayed an unexpected-route error. A further Work tap was required to reach the canonical opportunity list on Screen 67.

rootCause: The compact Mool launcher called setWorld for every selection, while the canonical bottom action strip used rootEntryRoutes for Buy, Eat, Ride, Book, Pay and Work.

The master walkthrough rejected all valid cross-feature navigation outside the currently selected journey instead of pausing at the universal Mool hub and adopting a unique matching operational journey.
resolution: Make the Mool launcher use the same canonical route map as the bottom action strip; Work now opens screens/67-work.html on the first selection.
Open the compact Mool launcher automatically from labelled Mool controls on Social, Buy, order, issue and Chat consumer screens.
Allow the master walkthrough to wait at Screen 04 as the universal hub and adopt a unique matching operational route after the user chooses a destination.
